accountBoundary: Authenticated consumer session; account identity intentionally omitted.
inputSource: Every submitted prompt was emitted by compileCompactVideoPrompt from a validated synthetic shot contract.
fingerprintMethod: SHA-256 over UTF-8. shotContractSha256 hashes JSON.stringify(shot) exactly as generated; promptSha256 hashes the exact submitted prompt string.
reviewMethod: Maintainer visual inspection of one-frame-per-second contact sheets. The A-roll result also used local VAD-enabled faster-whisper transcription.

runs.shotSummary: A worker carries one blank board into an elevator; door contact must pivot and pin the board for a restrained deadpan payoff.
runs.result: Causal contact was replaced by a static pose; performance exaggerated.

runs.shotSummary: Repair isolates one visible door-board contact, one pivot path, one terminal pin, and one tired blink.
runs.result: Opening state and performance improved; causal pinning still absent.

runs.shotSummary: An original watchmaker performs one restrained action and speaks one exact sentence once.
runs.result: Stable performance; exact approved line recovered once at 2.74-5.74 seconds.

runs.shotSummary: One unbranded glass bottle, one droplet, and one separate cap must complete a visible lowering and seating path.
runs.result: Materials passed; cap began seated and skipped its motion path.

runs.shotSummary: Repair fixes the bottle upright, declares one cap eight centimeters above the neck, and sequences droplet then seating.
runs.result: Repair regressed orientation, duplicated the cap, and invented a camera mark.

runs.shotSummary: One graphite coupe brakes, rotates through a wet hairpin with grounded tires, and exits through coherent spray.
runs.result: Motion passed; recognizable badge and plate text leaked.

runs.shotSummary: One dumpling rises above broth while exactly three droplets fall and form three distinct ripples.
runs.result: Material craft passed; exact droplets became strands and extra drips.

runs.shotSummary: One rust patch releases as particles, follows one visible arc, and assembles into one compass without changing the actor or world.
runs.result: Visible transformation phases resolved while actor and world stayed stable.

runs.shotSummary: Repair uses an original anonymous concept coupe with no badge, lettering, plate, or recognizable production-model design.
runs.result: Anonymous design removed visible marks while accepted motion held.

runs.shotSummary: Repair predeclares three separate broth beads and requires one-by-one release into three ripples.
runs.result: Exact fluid count remained unreliable in one text-only pass.

claimCeiling: This manifest is a sanitized maintainer report of one authenticated session. It is not an independently reproducible pixel audit, provider benchmark, universal success rate, or permanent capability claim.
